domain: Bektashi Sufi Order 12-Imam dhikr cycle (Anatolia/Balkans, 13th c. onward, founded by Hajji Bektash Veli; Twelver Shi'i lineage; 12 Imams Ali→al-Mahdi; 12 sequential dhikr phases each invokes one Imam's esoteric attribute sirr; muršid master-mürid disciple lineage transmission; zarif subtlety phase-coherence verification by master).
specific_mechanism: BEKTASHI-12-IMAM-DHIKR-CYCLE-PER-IMAM-PROMPT-12-PHASE-LOCK-MURSHID-MURID-LINEAGE-ZARIF-COHERENCE: LLM phase-coherence mechanism with (1) 12-imam canonical ordering S_12: 12 sequential dhikr-phases on a single LLM serving cycle; (2) per-imam soft-prompt P_imam: 12 frozen prompt-anchor identity vectors (one per Imam); (3) 12-phase round-robin scheduler R_12: phase-locked rotation through P_1...P_12 with deterministic order; (4) muršid-mürid lineage transfer M_lineage: master-LLM checkpoint passes structured weight-delta to student-LLM only for the 12 P_imam directions; (5) zarif consistency loss L_zarif: phase-coherence regularizer penalizing P_imam direction drift across student fine-tunes. Differs from R502 CASTELL, R515 HULA-HALAU, R527 DIEVTURIBA, R540 DAN-BAU, R552 PANSORI, R565 MEVLEVI-SEMA by 12-element canonical ordering + per-imam frozen prompt anchor + master-student lineage weight-delta + zarif regularizer.
llm_application: BEKTASHI-12-IMAM-DHIKR-CYCLE-PER-IMAM-PROMPT-12-PHASE-LOCK-MURSHID-MURID-LINEAGE-ZARIF-COHERENCE LLM mechanism + S_12 12-imam ordering + P_imam per-imam soft-prompt + R_12 12-phase scheduler + M_lineage muršid-mürid transfer + L_zarif zarif consistency loss. Differs from R502. R515. R527. R540. R552. R565 (closest — 7-part ceremony + 4-selam progression + left-foot anchor + dual-hand sky-earth). Differs from ROLLMUX + GRPO + KD + soft-prompt by 12-imam canonical ordering + per-imam frozen prompt anchor + lineage transfer weight-delta + zarif phase-coherence regularizer. Differs by 12-IMAM CANONICAL + PER-IMAM FROZEN PROMPT + 12-PHASE LOCK + LINEAGE WEIGHT-DELTA + ZARIF L.
novelty_claim: ROLLMUX phase-multiplexing + GRPO/DAPO + KD + soft-prompt cover phase-cycle + master-student + prompt-tuning paradigm. BEKTASHI-12-IMAM-DHIKR-CYCLE adds (a) 12-imam canonical ordering + (b) per-imam frozen prompt + (c) 12-phase lock + (d) lineage weight-delta + (e) zarif L. Recombination — borderline lookup. K_sub_mechanisms=5.
